calendar.matters:
Petition For Order To Modify Trust
Off Calendar Nov-07-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard: PTR-13-296950 The Criswell Family Trust and PTR-13-296951 The Ramona Mack Special Needs Trust.

Appearances: Rowena Navia and Bruce Feder for Ramona Mack (Beneficiary). Susanne Cohen for Gerald Criswell.

Ms. Mack stated that she trust Gerry, that she understands what waiver of accountings, waiver of bond and waiver of court authorization of payment of fees means. Ms. Navia explained that Ms. Mack would like to review accountings, but not with assistance of the Court. The Court finds that Ms. Mack has been advised of the requirements for accountings, bond and payment of fees, and that Ms. Mack appears to understand and knowingly and intelligently waives said requirements. Ms. Cohen stated that the solution is to create a Sub-Trust that basically gets put into the Family Trust, explained the difference between the Special Needs Trust (individual) and the Sub-Trust (Third Party Special Needs Trust), and spoke of the issue of Ms. Mack not being able to afford independent living without modifying the Trust, benefits she receives, etc. The Court granted Petition for Order to Modify Trust and the Petition to Establish Special Needs Trust (subject to review of the orders). Ms. Cohen was advised to file an ex parte petition to address her concern regarding redacting of a declaration that was filed with Ms. Mack's social security number.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order To Modify Trust
Off Calendar Oct-21-2013 Continued To Nov-06-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
